summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hours/Minutes feature and Paid/Unpaid toggle. All features working correctly. Backend APIs pass 9/9 tests. Frontend UI correctly displays separate h/m inputs, converts decimal hours to h/m format, and copy from recent sale populates fields correctly.
passed_tests: Calculator page loads with separate 'h' and 'm' inputs for Print Time (data-testid: print-time-h, print-time-m)
Calculator page loads with separate 'h' and 'm' inputs for Labor and Design time
Changing minutes triggers recalculation with correct decimal hours (1h 30m = 1.5h)
Saving a sale with hours+minutes stores correct print_time_hours as decimal in backend
Copying from recent sale correctly populates h/m fields (2.5h shows as 2h 30m)
Recent sales sidebar shows time formatted as 'Xh Ym' instead of decimal
Paid/Unpaid checkbox toggle works on Sales page
Paid filter dropdown filters sales correctly
Toast notifications appear for paid status changes
Stats cards (INCASSATO/DA INCASSARE) update correctly when toggling paid status
seed_data_creation: Created test sales with decimal hours (2.5h, 3.25h) for testing copy feature - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hours/Minutes feature fully implemented and tested. Frontend uses helper functions hoursToHM() and hmToHours() for conversion. formatTime() displays decimal hours as 'Xh Ym'. Backend stores print_time_hours as decimal float. Paid/Unpaid toggle uses PATCH /api/sales/{id}/paid endpoint.

hours_minutes_inputs.print_time: Separate h and m inputs with data-testid='print-time-h' and 'print-time-m'
hours_minutes_inputs.labor_time: Separate h and m inputs in grid layout
hours_minutes_inputs.design_time: Separate h and m inputs in grid layout
hours_minutes_inputs.conversion: Frontend converts h+m to decimal before sending to backend via useEffect

copy_from_sale.all_time_fields: print_time, labor_hours, design_hours all populate correctly

recent_sales_display.format: Shows 'Xh Ym' format (e.g., '2h 30m') instead of decimal
recent_sales_display.helper_function: formatTime() handles edge cases (0h shows only minutes, 0m shows only hours)

paid_unpaid_toggle.stats: INCASSATO and DA INCASSARE cards update correctly
